title: Implement Trie (Prefix Tree)
coreIdea: Design a data structure supporting efficient insert, search, and prefix-search operations on strings, by representing shared prefixes as shared paths in a tree where each node holds child pointers for each possible next character.
recognitionCues: asks to design a structure supporting insert/search/startsWith for strings
efficient prefix matching required across many strings
approach: Each TrieNode holds a dictionary/array of children (one per character) and an is-end-of-word flag. Insert: walk/create nodes character by character, mark last node as end-of-word. Search: walk nodes matching each character, return true only if path exists and last node is marked end-of-word. StartsWith: same walk, but don't require end-of-word flag.
timeComplexity: O(L) per operation, where L is word/prefix length
spaceComplexity: O(total characters across all inserted words)
